ast.name: error
ast.source: Anything as Markdown: metadata refresh failed for
ast.target: Anything as Markdown：元数据刷新失败，针对：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated extensions to open as Markdown (e.g. Mdx, svx, rmd, qmd)
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的扩展名，将作为 Markdown 打开（例如 Mdx, svx, rmd, qmd）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File extensions to open as Markdown
ast.target: 作为 Markdown 打开的文件扩展名

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 索引非 Markdown 文件（如笔记）（实验性）

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Labels may not update correctly until Obsidian is restarted.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 重启前，标签可能不会正确更新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reload not supported: toggle this plugin off and on in community plugins.
ast.target: 不支持重新加载：请在社区插件中关闭并重新打开此插件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Anything as Markdown 已重新加载。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Anything as Markdown: no compatible metadata refresh method found.
ast.target: Anything as Markdown：未找到兼容的元数据刷新方法。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Makes these files behave like normal .md notes. Tricks Obsidian into thinking they are .md files/caching them. May (probably will) break on future Obsidian versions.
ast.target: 使这些文件的行为类似于普通的 .md 笔记。通过让 Obsidian 将其视为 .md 文件/缓存它们来实现。这可能会（很可能）在未来的 Obsidian 版本中失效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Reload the plugin to apply changes.
ast.target: 重新加载插件以应用更改。
